description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers car park free of charge. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 3-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.
